title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Carrot, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA- Mama... A true man, I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once upon a time, for Zepo's sake...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With 50 years of your life taken away, you've now, in effect, lived 77 years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many years do you have left in you, I wonder?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure to at least choose where I die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Does it refer to the night?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roger! Lord open! Allow me to accompany you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That there's no such thing as an endless night.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boy! You've gotta stay on standby for now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up. Everyone, sooner or later, gets their own time to shine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, NOX, the night, really means this:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can serve as the foundation for the world that the masters await,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, I couldn't ask for anything more.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I should have time enough to do just that.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
